goal: is_iso_pair[O, M](c, f, inv) = (c.src(f) = c.dst(inv) and c.src(inv) = c.dst(f) and c.compose(inv, f) = c.identity(c.src(f)) and c.compose(f, inv) = c.identity(c.dst(f)))

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { (x0.src(x1) = x0.dst(x2) and x0.src(x2) = x0.dst(x1) and x0.identity(x0.src(x1)) = x0.compose(x2, x1) and x0.identity(x0.dst(x1)) = x0.compose(x1, x2)) = is_iso_pair[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[O, M](c, f, inv)

goal: c.compose(c.compose(inv, f), h) = c.compose(inv, c.compose(f, h))
c.compose(c.compose(inv, f), k) = c.compose(inv, c.compose(f, k))
c.compose(inv, c.compose(f, h)) = c.compose(inv, c.compose(f, k))
is_iso_pair[O, M](c, f, inv) = (c.src(f) = c.dst(inv) and c.src(inv) = c.dst(f) and c.compose(inv, f) = c.identity(c.src(f)) and c.compose(f, inv) = c.identity(c.dst(f)))

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { (x0.src(x1) = x0.dst(x2) and x0.src(x2) = x0.dst(x1) and x0.identity(x0.src(x1)) = x0.compose(x2, x1) and x0.identity(x0.dst(x1)) = x0.compose(x1, x2)) = is_iso_pair[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[O, M](c, f, inv)

goal: c.compose(c.compose(h, f), inv) = c.compose(h, c.compose(f, inv))
c.compose(c.compose(k, f), inv) = c.compose(k, c.compose(f, inv))
c.compose(c.compose(h, f), inv) = c.compose(c.compose(k, f), inv)
is_iso_pair[O, M](c, f, g) = (c.src(f) = c.dst(g) and c.src(g) = c.dst(f) and c.compose(g, f) = c.identity(c.src(f)) and c.compose(f, g) = c.identity(c.dst(f)))

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { (x0.src(x1) = x0.dst(x2) and x0.src(x2) = x0.dst(x1) and x0.identity(x0.src(x1)) = x0.compose(x2, x1) and x0.identity(x0.dst(x1)) = x0.compose(x1, x2)) = is_iso_pair[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[O, M](c, f, g)

goal: is_iso_pair[O, M](c, f, h) = (c.src(f) = c.dst(h) and c.src(h) = c.dst(f) and c.compose(h, f) = c.identity(c.src(f)) and c.compose(f, h) = c.identity(c.dst(f)))

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { (x0.src(x1) = x0.dst(x2) and x0.src(x2) = x0.dst(x1) and x0.identity(x0.src(x1)) = x0.compose(x2, x1) and x0.identity(x0.dst(x1)) = x0.compose(x1, x2)) = is_iso_pair[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[O, M](c, f, h)
